film.title: Talk Radio
film.overview: A rude, contemptuous talk show host becomes overwhelmed by the hatred that surrounds his program just before it goes national.

dialogues.dialogue: Waiting for another program? There are 30 other shows on in Dallas.  You listen to my show every night. Makes sense.  I feel real sorry for you, and I think you should be ashamed of yourself.  - You're such a pathetic nerd. - I should be ashamed?  At least I don't show up in public, half in the bag, making an utter jerk out of myself.
dialogues.cause_raw: being a public nuisance while intoxicated

dialogues.dialogue: You listen to my show every night. Makes sense.  I feel real sorry for you, and I think you should be ashamed of yourself.  - You're such a pathetic nerd. - I should be ashamed?  At least I don't show up in public, half in the bag, making an utter jerk out of myself.  You have no credibility. You like what I do. You need me.

Have been for the last 15 years. In fact, we're holding hands right now.  - Probably nigger lovers too. - Yeah, what race are you, sir?  I'm white, and I'm proud of it.  As one white man to another, let me ask you a question.  Do you know how much money white Americans spend every year on suntan lotion?
I just thought that... Forget it.  Forget it.  I'm very proud of you.  It's wonderful for you.  Come on. Okay?
